title: AI Decision Record
description: A tamper-evident record of an AI system decision event. Records form a cryptographic chain for audit trail integrity.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this decision event.

session_id.description: Operational session this decision belongs to.

model_version.description: Version identifier of the model that produced this decision.

policy_version.description: Version of the business or operational rule set active at decision time.

artifact_certificate_id.description: Certificate ID of the artifact (e.g., training dataset) referenced in this decision. Links to artifact-certificate record.

input_reference.description: Reference to the input data. May be a hash, identifier, or summary — not necessarily full input content.

decision_output.description: The output, classification, recommendation, or action produced by the AI system.

confidence_score.description: Model confidence in the decision output, where applicable.

why.description: Human-readable explanation or rationale summary for this decision. May be sterilized for public records.

factors.description: Contributing factors or signals that influenced this decision.

human_oversight_flag.description: Whether a human reviewed or confirmed this decision.

operator_id.description: Identifier of the deployer or operator responsible for this AI system.

record_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this record's canonical content. Format: 'sha256:<hex>'.

previous_hash.description: Hash of the prior record in the chain. Null for genesis records. Enables tamper-evident chaining.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical record content.
